criteria.description: Live tab: feed renders, auto-refresh cache-busts within ~10s, click-to-look fires POST /api/ptz/look with normalized (x,y), preset rows fire POST /api/ptz/preset/{id}, zoom slider fires POST /api/ptz/zoom on release.
criteria.evidence: 2-commit branch shape (feat + docs). `pnpm test:e2e` on main after cherry-pick: 38/38 green (+6 live tab tests: img src, refresh, click-to-look, preset click, zoom drag, console-error sweep).

notes: Second solo feature under the /simplify-in-feat runbook. Canonical 2-commit shape achieved cleanly, WRAPUP_SENTINEL flow held. Camera feed uses window.setInterval → setInterval cleanup simplification landed during implementer's own simplify pass.
